news.title: Musk's dominion: how a SpaceX-Tesla merger could be large enough to rival Nvidia on market cap
news.description: Rolling both Musk-owned companies into one could potentially make Musk the controller of the world’s most valuable listed firm, dethroning Nvidia. The merger math is in favour of Musk and his fans seem okay with the power he’ll wield.
